chunks.text: Fall 2021 Colloquium - EECS at Berkeley Fall 2021 Colloquium Fall 2021 EECS Colloquium was canceled Dedicated to hosting presentations at the intersection of Electrical Engineering and Computer Science, the EECS Colloquium offers a mix of short talks by faculty describing their latest research results as well as internationally distinguished speakers. It provides an opportunity for an exchange of ideas between our department’s community and the greater world. Subscribe to the eecs-announce mailing list through the web interface or via email so you can be apprised of upcoming talks. Send questions to colloquium@eecs.berkeley.edu Research Department Colloquium Series Formal Models of Language Generation EECS Department Colloquium Series Archive Berkeley EECS Annual Research Symposium (BEARS) Archive View Open Faculty Positions
